series_metadata.series_description: Record document processing of financial corrections, manual check requests, and incentive figures for county CSEA’s with reference to Tax Offset and Ohio Department of Tax payment processing and adjustments. Files include, but are not limited to, county email requests housed within the "FC_MC_Requests"(name of e-mail account), spreadsheets and internal procedures saved on the shared R:\ drive, and tracking of all report information and county requests within an Tax Access Database for reconciliation purposes.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office 7 years or until no longer administrative or Fiscal value then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in the office 7 years or until no longer administrative or Fiscal value then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
